info.title: Microsoft.Agents.CopilotStudio.Mcp
info.description: Enables MCP clients like GitHub Copilot or Claude Desktop to use published Microsoft Copilot Studio agents as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. This proxy handles OAuth authentication so your MCP client can securely connect to Copilot Studio.

options.name: --remote-server-url
options.description: URL of the Copilot Studio agent

options.name: --tenant-id
options.description: Azure AD tenant ID (optional, defaults to common endpoint)

options.name: --authority
options.description: OAuth authority URL (optional, defaults to common endpoint)

options.name: --enable-logging
options.description: Enable raw MCP traffic logging to file

options.name: --additional-headers
options.description: Additional HTTP headers in format key=value
